base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of brinstar_zoomer_crawl — a character from 1986 metroid. Zoomer — spike-shelled worm. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Zoomer — spike-shelled worm; 2-frame crawl along walls/ceilings; invincible to Beam, must be Missile'd
